brand.name: EthioMLS
brand.tagline: Manneenii fi bakka daldalaa Itoophiyaa keessatti barbaadi

home.lede: Manneen mirkanaa'an, pirojektoota ijaarsa irra jiranii fi bakkeewwan daldalaa Finfinnee keessatti — afaan afuriin.

filters.title: Filtaroota
filters.searchPlaceholder: Naannoo, pirojektii ykn jecha ijoo'n barbaadi

compliance.escrowBody: Maallaqni kuusaa bittootaa herrega baankii cufame keessatti qabama; sadarkaa ijaarsaa mirkanaa'een Labsii 1357/2024 jalatti gadhiifama.
compliance.foreignClearanceBody: Bituu mana jireenyaa lammiilee alaa Labsii 1388/2025 fi seera investimantii hordofa.
compliance.offPlanWarningBody: Kaffaltiileen ijaartaa qabeenya karoora duraatiin kanaaf herrega eskiroo baankii cufame keessatti cuqqaalama. Maallaqni gadhiifamu erga sadarkaan ijaarsaa mirkanaa'ee qofa (Labsii 1357/2024).

search.title: Waan barbaaddu nuuf himi
search.lede: Gaaffii gabaabaa sadii deebisi. Baajatni kee ETB fi USD gidduutti rate NBE tiin madaalama.

prompts.cluster: Klaasteri magaalaa golaa Addis Ababaa isa kami?

ai.lede: Waan barbaaddan jecha salphaan ibsaa — kaayyoo, naannoo fi baajata ni qopheessina.
ai.placeholder: Fkn: Bole biratti mana ciisicha 2 ji'atti ETB 80,000 gadii hireeffachuu
ai.error: Barbaachisaa hin hubanne. Gaaffiiwwan armaan gadii yaali.

search.simpleLede: Kaayyoo, naannoo fi baajata filadhu — booda manneen walsimuu ilaali.

completion.hint: Filters off-plan units and projects by verified construction progress.

building.scrollHint: Jilli scroll godhi ykn floor tuqi

consent.title: Hayyama qunnamtii daldalaa
consent.body: Lakkoofsi bilbilaa delalaa masked ta'ee hafe. Consent Gate mirkaneessi lead uumuuf qunnamtii argachuuf.
consent.checkbox: Gaaffii koo qooduuf fi qunnamtii delalaa argachuuf nan hayyama.

listings.title: Tarreewwan
listings.lede: Manneen fi bakka daldalaa Finfinnee keessatti argaman ilaali.

projects.title: Pirojektoota
projects.lede: Pirojektoota off-plan fi ijaarsa jiran escrow-stage wajjin hordofi.
projects.selectUnit: Inspect a floor, then select a unit to see MLS ID and property details.

developers.title: Ijaartoota
developers.lede: Ijaartoota koorporatee mirkanaa'an fi delaloota hayyama qaban EthioMLS irratti qoreessi.
developers.emptyListings: Qabeenya maxxanfamee ijaartuu kanaaf hin jiru.

inventory.heading: Kuusaa yunitii
inventory.lede: Pirojektootaafi ijaarsi gosa yunitiin qoodaman, lakkoofsa argamuu waliin.

pages.comingOnline: Tarreewwan online ta'aa jiru — fakkeenya armaan gadii.
pages.emptyHint: Kataloogiin guutuu yeroo PostgreSQL database qunnamu ni argama.
pages.emptyDirectory: Galmeewwan maxxanfaman hin jiru. Kuusaa fakkeenyaa guutuuf `npx prisma db seed` hordofaa.

auth.title: Gara EthioMLS seentaa
auth.lede: Imeelii ykn lakkoofsa bilbilaa Itoophiyaa fi jecha iccitii fayyadami. Maamiltoonni alaa imeelii fayyadamuu danda'u; SMS meeshaa haaraa bilbilaa naannoo qabu irratti qofa.
auth.identifierHint: Alaa: imeelii herrega kee fayyadami. Itoophiyaa keessa: bilbilaa naannoo (+251 9… / 7…).
auth.identifierClientHint: Alaa jirtaa? Imeelii kee fayyadami. Itoophiyaa keessa? Bilbilaa naannoo — koodii SMS ni ergina.
auth.phoneHint: Lakkoofsota naannoo qofa (+251 9… / +251 7…). Kan ala hin fudhatamu.
auth.codeSent: Koodii mirkaneessaa SMS tiin erginnee jirra.
auth.newDeviceHint: Meeshaan haaraa — seenuuf koodii SMS galchi. Meeshaaleen amanamoo yeroo itti aanu kana dabaru.
auth.mockHint: SMS haala mock irratti — koodii debug armaan gadii fayyadami.
auth.resetEmailOnly: Jecha iccitii deebisuun amma lakkoofsa bilbilaa Itoophiyaa barbaada. Imeeliin galmaa'eetta? Jecha iccitii kee yaadadhu ykn Google fayyadami.

password.label: Jecha iccitii
password.hint: Yoo xiqqaate arfiilee 8. Koodiin SMS meeshaa haaraa irratti qofa (bilbilaa naannoo yoo qabaatte).
password.tooShort: Jechi iccitii arfiilee 8 yoo xiqqaate qabaachuu qaba.

reset.title: Jecha iccitii haaromsii
reset.lede: Lakkoofsa bilbilaa Itoophiyaa fi jecha iccitii haaraa galchi. Koodii SMS tiin mirkaneessina.
reset.codeSent: Koodii haaromsuu SMS tiin erginneerra. Jecha iccitii haaraa olkaa'uuf galchi.

role.label: Gahee kee
role.hint: Herrega kanaaf gahee tokko filadhu. Booddee jijjiiruu hin dandeessu.
role.locked: Gaheen kee yeroo galmaa'uu murtaa'eera; jijjiiruun hin danda'amu.
role.clientHint: Manneen barbaadi — imeelii (alaa) ykn bilbilaa Itoophiyaa tiin galmaa'i.
role.ownerHint: Mana kee gurguruu ykn kireessuu galmeessi.

developer.hint: Akka ijaartuu galmaa'uuf maqaa daldalaa fi lakkoofsa TIN barbaachisu. TIN etrade.gov.et irratti mirkaneessina.
developer.tinRequired: Lakkoofsa TIN digirii 10 sirrii ta'e galchi.
developer.tinHint: Itti mirkaneessa e-Trade business license checker:

profile.title: Profile kee
profile.lede: Lakkoofsi bilbilaa Itoophiyaa kee seensa keeti. Imeeliin filannoo dha.
profile.phoneLocked: Bilbilli ID seensaa keeti; asitti hin jijjiiramu.
profile.emailHint: Galmaa'uu hin barbaachisu — qunnamtii fi dhiyeessii tiif dabali.

password.title: Jecha iccitii jijjiiri
password.lede: Jecha iccitii ammaa galchi, sana booda haaraa filadhu.

dashboard.title: Teessoo gabaa
dashboard.lede: Fayyaa kuusaa Finfinnee, tarree mirkaneessaa, fi haguuggii hiikkaa Gemini.

imports.title: Import sources
imports.lede: Add public Telegram channels, Facebook Pages, or websites. Scraped posts become pending listings with contact numbers for admin audit before publication. East-corridor off-plan sources (Ayat, Temer, brokers) can be seeded and bulk-run with npm run scrape:offplan-ads.
imports.addLede: Paste a Telegram handle (e.g. @gechocommission8), a Facebook Page URL (facebook.com/YourPage), or a website URL. Tag corridor off-plan sources with notes containing corridor-offplan.
imports.label: Label (optional)
imports.cliHint: Scrape all corridors: npm run scrape:offplan-ads · one corridor: --corridor=east
imports.empty: No sources yet. Add a Telegram channel, Facebook Page, or website above.

scrapeReview.title: Scrape invite review
scrapeReview.lede: Approve scraped listings before HaHu SMS goes out. Left: raw post. Right: Gemini-structured fields and Amharic message preview.
scrapeReview.empty: No scrapes waiting for invite approval.
scrapeReview.accountCreated: Created {role} account “{label}” — they claim login via Reset password.

salesKit.title: Sales kit → role account
salesKit.lede: Upload a developer/broker sales PDF or DOCX. Extract listings, attach them to an existing developer or broker account, or create one with their phone so they can sign in via Reset password.
salesKit.createNew: Create a new developer/broker account for this kit
salesKit.filesHint: PDF, DOCX, or images · up to 3 files · 4 MB each
salesKit.parseFailed: Could not parse the sales kit.
salesKit.needFiles: Choose at least one sales kit file.
salesKit.needAccount: Select a developer or broker account.
salesKit.needPhone: Enter a phone number for the new account.

rolesIndex.title: Choose your role
rolesIndex.lede: Client, broker, owner, developer, or admin — each hub highlights the tools you need.

client.title: Find your next home
client.lede: Browse verified listings and projects. Sign in to unlock contact numbers, visits, and 360° tours.

broker.title: List and manage inventory
broker.lede: Publish properties for clients, keep contacts ready for admin audit, and track the market from one place.

owner.title: Sell or rent your property
owner.lede: List your own home with photos and documents. Every submission waits for admin audit before it goes live.

developer.title: Showcase projects and off-plan units
developer.lede: Publish escrow-backed off-plan inventory with the full document pack, unit photos, and Fayda verify for your company rep.

admin.title: Audit and import the market
admin.lede: Scrape Telegram and websites, add listings to pending review, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.

developer.title: Publish escrow-backed inventory
developer.lede: Track readiness, submit the full document pack, and follow units through admin review from one place.
developer.readinessProfileNeeded: No developer profile yet — trade name and registration are collected on first inventory submit.
developer.readinessFaydaOk: Fayda eSignet verified for your account
developer.readinessFaydaNeeded: Fayda verify still needed (demo verify on the inventory form until RP credentials are live)
developer.packLede: Every unfinished unit needs org docs, floor plan, title or lease, MUD permit, escrow letter, photos, and Fayda — AI can prefill fields from uploads.
developer.packFayda: Fayda eSignet for the company representative
developer.pendingEmpty: No listings waiting for audit. Submit off-plan inventory to get started.
developer.publishedEmpty: Nothing published yet — approved inventory will appear here.

admin.title: Review, audit, and publish
admin.lede: Work the pending queue, add listings before you verify them, clear collision alerts, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.
admin.addListingHint: Enters pending review — audit and verify before publish.
admin.checklistLede: Every approval must pass identity, ownership, price, location, media, permit, escrow, contact, and fraud screens.
admin.readyEmpty: Nothing audited yet — approve a pending listing to see it here.

adminAudit.title: Client-protection audit
adminAudit.lede: Complete every check before approving, or reject to draft with a written reason. Approval does not publish — use Publish after audit passes.
adminAudit.notesPlaceholder: Why you approve or reject. Reject: min. 5 characters. Approve: min. 10.
adminAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this listing.
adminAudit.rejectedToDraft: Listing rejected and returned to draft.
adminAudit.rejectNeedsNotes: Reject needs 5+ characters, or tap a quick reason above.
adminAudit.approveNeedsChecks: Approve needs every check ticked and a 10+ character reason.
adminAudit.publishNeedsApprove: Publish unlocks after you approve the audit (check all + reason).

attach.title: Attach to role
attach.lede: Link this listing to a developer, broker, or owner account so the queue stays organized.
attach.unassigned: Not attached to a party account
attach.deactivateLede: Turns off their login and moves this listing to draft. Choose a reason.
attach.deactivated: Developer deactivated and listing moved to draft.
attach.deactivateNeedReason: Choose a reason from the dropdown first.
attach.deactivateNoDeveloper: No developer is attached to this listing.

enrich.title: Enrich pending listing
enrich.lede: Upload a sales PDF, DOCX, or images to parse fields into this listing, or attach gallery / 360° photos before you approve.
enrich.filesHint: PDF, DOCX, or images · up to 3 files · used to fill title, price, beds, and more
enrich.editReasonPlaceholder: Why are you changing this listing? (min. 10 characters)
enrich.editReasonRequired: Add an edit reason before applying.
enrich.photosHint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · becomes the card cover and detail gallery
enrich.as360Label: Also use as 360° virtual tour frames
enrich.applied: Listing fields updated from parsed data.
enrich.needDraft: Parse a file first, then apply.

projectAudit.title: Project client-protection audit
projectAudit.lede: Off-plan projects must pass every check before going live. Approval does not publish — use Publish project after audit passes.
projectAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this project.
projectAudit.rejectedToDraft: Project rejected and returned to draft.

listingDetail.noPhone: No phone on file — admin will add one after audit.
listingDetail.signUpForContact: Sign up with your Ethiopian mobile number to see the contact phone and request a visit.
listingDetail.signUpForTour: Create a free account to open the 360° virtual tour.
listingDetail.tourComingSoonLede: Daawwannaan panoramaa tarree kanaaf amma hin fe'amne. Agentii yookaan developer erga dabalee booda deebi'ii ilaali.
